task_objective: Eliminate remote CDN dependencies in report templates
design_decisions: Bundled React, React-DOM, Lucide-React, and Tailwind CSS locally in src/ibis_profiling/vendor/js/. Updated report generation logic to inline these assets by default (offline=True) for maximum portability and security. Implemented SRI hashes and a restrictive Content Security Policy (CSP) to mitigate supply-chain and data-exfiltration risks. Added --offline/--online flags to CLI.
results: Reports are now fully standalone and offline-capable by default. Security posture improved with SRI and CSP. All 135 tests passed.
